prediction.reasoning: Short-term stock predictions are inherently uncertain. This prediction assumes a slight upward drift over the next three days from the current price of $148.98, yielding a point estimate of $149.13. The confidence intervals are calculated based on an estimated daily volatility of 1.3% for GILD, scaled over a 3-day period (using the square root of time rule). No specific news or catalysts for GILD have been factored in, as this prediction relies on general market behavior and historical volatility for a large-cap pharmaceutical stock. General market sentiment and company-specific developments could cause the actual price to fall outside these ranges.
